Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action
Off Calendar Nov-19-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Minor's Compromise.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Philip A. Segal, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NASSIRA DAHMANI, AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR IBRAHIM MEZHOUD, A MINOR.
Petitioner sworn and examined.

After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows:
Total Settlement: $15,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $3750.00 payable to Law Firm of Kern, Noda, Devine & Segal
Costs: $5513.89
A net balance of $5736.11 as a check to a Kern, Noda, Devine, & Segal trust account for processing to Nassira Dahmani.

Court signed Order Granting approval of Minor.
